parameters.query: =select id, name, slug, whatsapp_number from public.tenants where whatsapp_number = '{{ $("Normalize Payload").item.json.tenant_phone }}' limit 1;

=select id, name, phone_number, consent_given from public.patients where tenant_id = nullif('{{ $("Find Tenant").item.json.id ?? "" }}', '')::uuid and phone_number = '{{ $("Normalize Payload").item.json.from_number }}' limit 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { tenant_id: $("Find Tenant").item.json.id, phone_number: $("Normalize Payload").item.json.from_number, patient_id: $("Find Patient").item.json.id ?? null, lead_score: $("Find Patient").item.json.id ? 'warm' : 'cold', status: $("Find Patient").item.json.id ? 'qualified' : 'new', notes: $("Normalize Payload").item.json.message_body } }}

parameters.query: =insert into public.conversations (tenant_id, patient_id, message_direction, message_type, content, raw_payload) select nullif('{{ $("Find Tenant").item.json.id ?? "" }}', '')::uuid, nullif('{{ $("Find Patient").item.json.id ?? "" }}', '')::uuid, 'inbound', 'text', $$ {{ $("Normalize Payload").item.json.message_body }} $$, $$ {{ JSON.stringify($("Normalize Payload").item.json.raw_payload) }} $$::jsonb where '{{ $("Find Tenant").item.json.id ?? "" }}' <> '' returning id;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { tenant_id: $("Find Tenant").item.json.id, message_body: $("Normalize Payload").item.json.message_body, patient_name: $("Find Patient").item.json.name ?? null, consent_given: !!$("Find Patient").item.json.consent_given, top_k: 3 } }}

parameters.query: =insert into public.conversations (tenant_id, patient_id, message_direction, message_type, content, raw_payload, intent_detected, llm_model_used) select nullif('{{ $("Find Tenant").item.json.id ?? "" }}', '')::uuid, nullif('{{ $("Find Patient").item.json.id ?? "" }}', '')::uuid, 'outbound', 'text', $$ {{ JSON.parse($("Assistant Reply").item.json.ai_result).reply ?? $("Assistant Reply").item.json.ai_result }} $$, jsonb_build_object('ai_result', $$ {{ $("Assistant Reply").item.json.ai_result }} $$, 'rag_matches', $$ {{ JSON.stringify($("Assistant Reply").item.json.rag_matches ?? []) }} $$::jsonb), $$ {{ JSON.parse($("Assistant Reply").item.json.ai_result).intent ?? '' }} $$, '{{ $("Assistant Reply").item.json.model ?? "" }}' where '{{ $("Find Tenant").item.json.id ?? "" }}' <> '' returning id;

parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ { success: true, tenant_id: $("Find Tenant").item.json.id ?? null, patient_id: $("Find Patient").item.json.id ?? null, lead_id: $("Upsert Lead").item.json.lead?.id ?? null, inbound_conversation_id: $("Log Inbound Conversation").item.json.id ?? null, outbound_conversation_id: $("Log Outbound Conversation").item.json.id ?? null, inbound_message: $("Normalize Payload").item.json.message_body, ai_result: $("Assistant Reply").item.json.ai_result, rag_matches: $("Assistant Reply").item.json.rag_matches ?? [] } }}
